subtitles.original: potatoになっていく
subtitles.english: Becoming potatoes

subtitles.original: もう救えない スクラブばかりのブルペンじゃ
subtitles.english: In a bullpen full of nothing but irredeemable scrubs,

subtitles.original: ちゃちな青春も お涙もそれすらないもんな保存
subtitles.english: there's not even any cheap youth or tears to be found.

subtitles.original: 相当に笑えない コメディのワンシーンもままならない
subtitles.english: It's not even funny, not even a single scene of this comedy.

subtitles.original: 冷めたチャウダーをただ混ぜ合わせた さもそんな人生さ
subtitles.english: Just mixed up cold chowder, such is life.

subtitles.original: 掛け違えたボタンの身なりを
subtitles.english: How long are you going to pretend not to see

subtitles.original: いつのいつまで見ぬ振りしようか
subtitles.english: your own ill-fitting appearance?

subtitles.original: そうかい 抗弁のしようもないな
subtitles.english: That's right, I can't even be bothered to argue back.

subtitles.original: たまたま火事場に逃げ込んで 善かれと油を放り込んで
subtitles.english: Accidentally escaped into the fire, and thinking I was helping, poured oil on it,

subtitles.original: 生活も計画も 全部がpotatoになっていく
subtitles.english: my life and my plans are all turning into potatoes.
